LanguageData.Bullet_NCL42H.label: NCL42H Sniper Round
LanguageData.NCL_SniperGun.label: NCL42H
LanguageData.NCL_SniperGun.description:
Weapon Archive: NCL42H Sniper Rifle Designation: NCL42H Affiliation: Neo-Communist League "Iron Law" Standard Weapons Series
Functional Overview: Specialized sniper rifle designed exclusively for Dinergate Snipers. Delivers peak performance in range, accuracy, damage, and armor penetration. Excessive weight and specialized ergonomics restrict effective operation to Dinergate units only.
LanguageData.NCL_SniperGun.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.NCL_SniperGun.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.NCL_SniperGun.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: NCL42H
